title: Local Artisan Gift
description: I need a gift card or gift box that offers local artisanal products from the English Channel—such as oysters, cider, ceramics—and allows for personalization.
narrative: The user wishes to give a thoughtful, regionally‑inspired gift that highlights the unique heritage of the English Channel. Relevant documents are those that mention AttitudeManche or similar local product collections, gift boxes containing oyster kits or regional food items, and gift card solutions that can be personalized and used for local artisanal purchases. Non‑regional or generic gift‑card information should be considered irrelevant.

title: Lamb Tajine Wine Pairing
description: How should I tweak a lamb tajine with vegetables for optimal flavor and pair it with Châteauneuf‑du‑Pape?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive approach that combines a refined lamb tajine recipe—with guidance on spice adjustments derived from user commentary (e.g., reducing chili, scaling vegetables)—and detailed recommendations for pairing the dish with Châteauneuf‑du‑Pape wine, including wine characteristics, serving temperature, and complementary dishes. Relevant documents should provide both cooking instructions and wine‑pairing expertise that meet these criteria.

title: Lotus Hybrid Sedan
description: What are the performance, cost, and environmental benefits of the Lotus EVE Hybrid family sedan compared to other hybrid sedans?
narrative: The user is researching whether Lotus's low‑cost hybrid concept truly offers advantages in fuel efficiency, emissions reduction, and affordability versus competitors such as the Toyota Prius. They want detailed specifications, price points, market positioning, and evidence to determine if the EVE Hybrid is a viable product or merely a marketing stunt.

title: Farm Poultry Recipes
description: How can I cook dishes using open‑air farm poultry from the JC Farm, including recipe options and preparation details?
narrative: The user is a home cook who wants specific recipes that incorporate poultry sourced directly from the JC Farm, preferring free‑range, local and GMO‑free options. Relevance requires mention of JC Farm poultry, open‑air raising, recipe steps, ingredients, and purchase instructions.

title: Car Sunshade Efficiency
description: Which sunshade solutions reduce car interior heat most effectively while meeting French tinting regulations?
narrative: The user wants a detailed comparison of alternate sunshade options for a vehicle, including sun visors, window films, and other shading accessories. Relevance criteria are items that provide heat and UV reduction, comply with French law on front‑side transparency (minimum 70 % visible light), have proven durability (e.g., polyurethane‑coated Oxford fabric, 3‑layer tempered glass), are easy to install (pre‑cut kits, thermofilled films), and have authoritative support in product specifications, expert reviews or manufacturer documentation. The response should summarize key performance metrics (heat rejection %, UV blocking %, color/contrast), legal compliance notes, and practical installation guidance.

title: RA vs SLE Ocular
description: What are the key ocular manifestations that differentiate rheumatoid arthritis from systemic lupus erythematosus?
narrative: The user seeks a concise, comparative list of ocular signs in RA and SLE, focusing on anterior and posterior segment involvement, to aid in differential diagnosis; they require details that highlight common features and distinguishing findings essential for clinical practice.

title: Rental Tax Impact
description: I need to understand how the 2020 EU changes to car energy labeling, especially the WLTP CO2 targets, affect the taxation of my used Ssangyong that I rent out via a collaborative platform in France.
narrative: The user is trying to determine whether the new fuel‑efficiency labeling rules (WWLTP‑based targets, target values, and energy labels) influence the tax assessment of income derived from renting out a used vehicle on a collaborative‑economy platform. Relevance requires information that links the updated WLTP emissions targets and energy labels, the tax rules for rental income in France (including thresholds for movable goods), and specifics about used Ssangyong cars (e.g., CO2 figures).

title: Ukrainian Refugee Education
description: What support systems and challenges do Ukrainian students face when integrating into French schools during the war?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information on the experiences of Ukrainian refugee students in French educational institutions amid the ongoing conflict, including official policies, practical support mechanisms, linguistic and cultural adaptation, teacher and staff perspectives, and the overall well‑being and integration outcomes for these students.

title: Unemployment Eligibility for Self‑Employed
description: What are the eligibility requirements and benefit details for self‑employed workers in France to receive unemployment insurance under the 2019–2021 reforms?
narrative: The user is a self‑employed professional in France who has recently faced financial difficulty and wants to know whether they can receive unemployment benefits.  They require up‑to‑date information on the specific income thresholds (e.g., €10,000 minimum annual income over the last two years), the duration and amount of benefits (e.g., €800 per month for six months), any required administrative steps (e.g., filing for liquidation), and how the new reforms (opening up to resigning workers, changes in calculation of allowances) affect their situation.  Relevance is judged by whether the source discusses the exact conditions, benefit formulas, application procedures, and recent legislative changes for self‑employed individuals.”}

title: Townhouse Garden Charleval
description: Where can I find a well‑conditioned townhouse with a garden in Charleval within a €160,000 budget?
narrative: I am a young couple looking for a townhouse in perfect condition that includes a garden, a double garage, central heating, and a modern kitchen. The property must be located in Charleval, be priced around €156,000, and be close to local shops and public transport. I am interested in listings that highlight these features and could be viewed quickly.

title: Commute Energy Choice
description: Which vehicle or car‑sharing service offers the lowest CO₂ emissions and running cost per km for a typical work‑day commute in a European city?
narrative: The user is planning a daily commute and wants to evaluate options such as the Mercedes‑powered Car2go Smart Fortwo, plug‑in hybrids (Renault Captur E‑Tech, Kia Niro, Toyota Prius Plug‑in), fully electric models (Dacia Spring, Audi A3 40 TFSI e, Citroën C5 Aircross Hybrid) and shared services. Relevance is established when a document provides comparative data on CO₂ per km, fuel/electric cost per km, charging time and infrastructure availability, vehicle dimensions and usability via mobile apps, plus any subsidy or tax‑credit information. Documents that lack these metrics or discuss unrelated topics are considered irrelevant.

title: Variety Selection for Cooking and Disease
description: Which potato variety should I grow or buy for baking, frying, and minimal pesticide use while also being suitable for early harvest?
narrative: The user is looking for a potato variety that balances culinary performance—especially for baking and frying—with high resistance to common diseases such as late blight and downy mildew, is available in early‐season or new potato form, and can be sourced organically or with reduced pesticide use. Relevance is measured by information that lists specific varieties, their organoleptic (taste, texture), disease resistance traits, maturity and harvest window, organic certification status, and recommended cultivation practices that minimize chemical treatments.

title: Heaven Earth Poetics
description: Find poems or literary texts that explore the transition from heaven to earth and link spiritual awakening with earthly experience.
narrative: The user is looking for passages that illustrate the metaphysical shift of consciousness toward a new earth, often using harvest or autumn imagery, and may reference the teachings of Eckhart Tolle or similar spiritual movements. Relevant results should contain discussions of ego, collective consciousness, and vivid naturalistic imagery that bridges inner celestial states with outer earthly realities.

title: Return-to-Work Models
description: What evidence‑based return‑to‑work models are used to support employees with mental health conditions?
narrative: The user is a human resources professional or occupational health researcher looking for peer‑reviewed, evidence‑based descriptions of structured interventions, collaborative processes, and policy recommendations for facilitating the return to work of employees absent due to mental health problems. Relevant documents must detail program design, implementation steps, evaluation results, and involve multiple stakeholders (employer, employee, healthcare provider, union representatives, insurance). General wellness or anecdotal advice is not relevant.

title: TROUILLARD Corporate Profile
description: What are the key corporate details and address of TROUILLARD SA in France?
narrative: The user wants a concise overview of the company’s legal structure, main activity codes (NAF), headquarters locations, and contact details for potential business inquiries; relevant documents should contain up‑to‑date statutory information and official addresses.

title: Home Reconstruction Cost
description: How can homeowners realistically estimate reconstruction costs for insurance purposes while accounting for inflation and market changes?
narrative: The user seeks detailed, practical guidance on calculating replacement costs for home reconstruction to set appropriate insurance coverage. Relevant content should discuss cost‑estimation techniques, inflation‑adjustment methods, data sources, appraisal frequency, policy wording, and common pitfalls. Examples and case studies that illustrate how to avoid over‑ or under‑coverage are especially valuable.

title: Jean Moulin Pantheon Debate
description: What controversies and differing interpretations surrounded Jean Moulin’s 1964 induction into the Pantheon, especially regarding his political affiliations, personal background, and the political context of the ceremony?
narrative: The user is looking for a nuanced, scholarly overview that aggregates the main controversies highlighted in contemporary and retrospective accounts. Relevance should include discussions of Moulin’s alleged communist ties versus Gaullist portrayal, insights from biographers like Aude Terray and references to critiques, the political motivations of Charles de Gaulle and the French press, the role of figures such as Maurice Papon and François Mitterrand in relation to the Pantheon, and the broader historical debate about the post‑war commemoration of resistance heroes. The response should cite primary sources, historiographical analyses, and critical commentaries that question the glorification narrative, and should not merely summarize the ceremony but delve into the conflicting interpretations that emerged in the 1960s and later.

title: Avocado Brandade Variations
description: How can I adapt an avocado brandade recipe for a low‑fat, vegetarian diet?
narrative: The user wants to modify the classic avocado brandade, exploring ingredient substitutions (e.g., reducing oil, omitting cod, adding herbs or spices like cardamom) to fit dietary restrictions while preserving flavor. Relevant documents include recipe descriptions, ingredient lists, and discussion of creative variations.

title: Family Spa Booking
description: What are the booking options, room capacities, and Covid‑19 restrictions for a family at the private leisure centre in Pessac?
narrative: The user intends to arrange a spa itinerary for a family of 4–6 members and needs documents that outline reservation procedures, available thematic spaces, capacity limits, opening hours, and health protocols specific to the Pessac centre. Relevance is judged by whether the source provides concrete details on these criteria.

title: Green Supplier Comparison
description: I want to compare renewable‑energy suppliers in France and Belgium, focusing on pricing, contract flexibility, and customer service quality.
narrative: The user is looking for a supplier that offers 100% renewable electricity, competitive tariffs, no long‑term commitment, and high customer satisfaction ratings. Documents should provide data on green tariffs, discount codes, contract terms, and service reviews to assess relevance.

title: 2013 Kia Sorento Emission Efficiency
description: What are the key design and drivetrain changes in the 2013 Kia Sorento that reduce fuel consumption and pollutant emissions, and how do they compare with later models?
narrative: The user is looking for technical data on the 2013 Kia Sorento’s fuel‑consumption and emission performance, focusing on specific attributes mentioned in the document such as a lighter chassis, an optimized drivetrain, and an improved cockpit range. Relevance requires evidence from the document text, official Kia press releases, and credible automotive reviews that quantify consumption levels, emission values, or compare them to successors or competitors.

title: Gallic Rooster Symbolism
description: What is the historical evolution and contemporary usage of the Gallic rooster as a symbol in French culture?
narrative: The user seeks an overview of the origins, political uses, and modern appearances of the Gallic rooster, focusing on its presence in national flags, currency, sports emblems, monuments to the dead, and in media, and wants to understand how its symbolism has changed over the centuries. Relevance means documents that discuss its symbolic significance, historical context (e.g., its role under the Third Republic and on mayoral badges), ceremonial uses, and contemporary representations in sports logos, monuments, and popular culture. The user also expects mention of regional neutrality and references to specific artifacts such as coins, banners, and early 20th‑century displays.

title: Cross-Country Car Hire
description: I'm planning a multi‑city road trip across Europe and North America and need help comparing car rental options without hidden fees.
narrative: The user seeks a reliable comparison of rental cars for a cross‑border itinerary that includes precise pick‑up and drop‑off locations, one‑way flexibility, and all‑inclusive pricing (taxes, insurance, unlimited mileage, airport surcharges). Relevance is judged by whether a passage offers detailed, up‑to‑date information on car types, cost breakdowns, booking procedures, and links to reputable rental platforms that guarantee transparent pricing and clear terms.

title: Hypermarket vs Specialist Rentals
description: How can I compare the cost, vehicle options and location convenience of rental services offered by hypermarket chains with those of specialized car and utility rental companies?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed comparison of vehicle rental options offered by large retail chains such as Carrefour, Leclerc, and Intermarché versus dedicated rental agencies like Europcar and Hertz. Relevance criteria include price information, available vehicle categories (compact, van, luxury, utility), proximity of pickup/drop‑off points, contract terms (mileage, insurance, one‑way fee), and any promotional or regional discounts available through the retailers.

title: Edible Safety of Diseased Potatoes
description: Is it safe to eat potatoes or tomatoes that show signs of downy mildew or have turned green/sprouted?
narrative: The user seeks authoritative information about the health risks associated with consuming produce infected by downy mildew or that has turned green or sprouted. They want to know if glycoalkaloids (e.g., solanine) or other toxins pose danger, whether specific parts can be safely eaten, how this aligns with USDA or scientific guidance, and best practices for storage, cooking, or disposal. Relevance will be judged on inclusion of evidence‑based safety assessments, toxicology details, storage recommendations, and practical cooking or handling advice for infected or green potatoes and mildewn tomatoes.

title: Gourmet Beaujolais Dinner
description: How can I combine Beaujolais wines with specific spice blends to create a cohesive menu of appetizers, main courses and desserts?
narrative: The user is planning a refined evening that showcases Beaujolais terroir while leveraging the aromatic profiles of various spice blends mentioned in the documents (e.g., Kampot pepper, Curry Noir, Baharat, and aromatic herb infusions). They seek detailed guidance on selecting appropriate Beaujolais crus (such as Moulin à Vent or Beaujolais-Village), determining suitable wine‑pairing rules for each dish, and integrating the spices into recipes that complement the wines’ flavor profiles. Relevance should include precise wine recommendations (including aging notes), spice blend compositions, cooking instructions that preserve the spices’ aroma, and sourcing tips for high‑quality ingredients.

title: Eco‑Friendly Boat Shoes
description: Which men’s boat shoes combine eco‑responsible leather, hand‑sewn construction, and durable soles for long‑term wear?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensively green, high‑quality pair of boat shoes that satisfy several exacting criteria. Relevance should be limited to references to manufactures that: 1) use leather sourced from tanneries classified as Silver or Gold by an independent environmental body (as mentioned for Timberland’s eco‑leather); 2) employ hand‑sewn techniques such as the 3‑eyelet construction described; 3) provide a sturdy sole type (spit or comparable) suitable for wet or boater use; 4) mention comfort features for prolonged wearing on boats; and 5) fall within a moderate price range and are currently available. Documents describing generic casual slides, flip‑flops, or purely fashion footwear that lack these construction and sustainability details should be excluded.

title: Volkswagen Eos 2.0 TFSI Stage‑1 Tune
description: How can I re‑program a 2006 Volkswagen Eos 2.0 TFSI 210 hp engine to run E85 flex‑fuel and boost power—what are the required steps, hardware/software, and cost?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed, hand‑on guide for an engine‑reprogramming (Stage 1) on a 2006 Volkswagen Eos 2.0 TFSI. They need to know the ECU model (MED17.5.2), the specific ECU software numbers, any OBD‑II hardware needed (e.g., diagnostic calculator), whether an ECU reflash kit or a custom calibration is required, and how to set the vehicle for E85 operation. Additionally, they want the approximate cost of the kit or services (around €760–€800), the expected power gain (e.g., 2508 rpm to 1848 rpm, torque increase), and any impact on fuel consumption or warranty. Relevance is judged by documents that explicitly mention the VW engine code, the flex‑fuel conversion, the stage‑1 power increase numbers, and cost details. All other non‑engineering content is outside relevance.}

title: Weekly Car Rental Carpentras
description: What are the cheapest reliable options for a week‑long car rental in Carpentras, including price, insurance, mileage, and cancellation terms?
narrative: The user plans a week in Carpentras and wants the lowest cost rental. Relevant results should list the daily rate (average €18 per day), guarantee of unlimited mileage, all‑risk insurance coverage, and a free cancellation policy up to 48 hours before pickup. Content about one‑day or short‑term rentals, or vehicles lacking these features, should be considered irrelevant.

title: Used Car Purchase Checks
description: What specific documents and details should I verify on a used car’s registration certificate before buying it?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive checklist of items to inspect on a second‑hand vehicle’s registration certificate (the grey card) to ensure the car is legitimate, properly registered, and has no hidden issues. Relevance is determined by documents that enumerate the necessary fields—registration number, first registration date, owner's name and address, make, model, VIN, weight, previous registration dates, and first technical inspection date—along with guidance on verifying the grey card’s authenticity.

title: Lincoln Labor Accuracy
description: Does the Spielberg film "Lincoln" accurately reflect Abraham Lincoln’s support for the labor movement and his socialist influences, based on historical documents and critiques?
narrative: The user is researching the historical accuracy of the film regarding Lincoln’s views on labor and socialism. They want documents that discuss Lincoln’s advocacy for workers, his connection to Marx, and critiques pointing out omissions in the film. Relevant documents should contain primary sources, scholarly analyses, and contemporary criticism that address these aspects. Non‑historical or unrelated financial or coin collection materials should be ignored.

title: Motorcycle Accident Claims
description: How should I file an insurance claim following a motorcycle accident involving a car?
narrative: The user seeks a step‑by‑step guide for reporting the incident, collecting evidence, identifying applicable insurance coverages (third‑party liability, bodily injury, damages), dealing with insurance adjusters, and understanding the legal context for compensation, especially as a motorcyclist.

title: Vienna Concert Dinner Package
description: What details are available about the Kursalon Vienna concert and dinner packages, including dates, event timings, categories, and pricing?
narrative: The user is planning to attend a Strauss and Mozart concert at Vienna's Kursalon and wants comprehensive information to choose an appropriate dinner‑concert package.  Relevance criteria: documents that list specific concert dates and times, dinner start times, seating or ticket categories (VIP, A, B, C), price points for each category, and any ancillary details such as inclusion of drinks or wine. The user needs to evaluate dates, times, and categories to make an informed booking decision.

title: Indre Retreat
description: I’m planning to retire in Indre‑et‑Loire and need a local GP, a plot of land to build a home, and a nearby holiday rental with good amenities.
narrative: The user is looking to retire in the Indre‑et‑Loire region. They want to locate a general practitioner in or near a specific village, acquire a ready‑to‑use plot of land that has all utilities connected and legal permissions confirmed, and find a holiday rental close to the GP and the land with amenities such as internet, garden, and proximity to transport. Relevance should be based on documents that provide GP listings with addresses, land sale information with viability details, and holiday rental descriptions with location, amenities, and contact information.

title: Consumer Mediation Outcomes
description: What are the outcomes and effectiveness of consumer mediation in e‑commerce disputes in France?
narrative: I want to understand how well consumer mediators resolve disputes like the ones reported by Wonderbox, including success rates, timeframes, and legal implications. Relevant documents should discuss mediation processes, applicable laws and regulations, case studies involving e‑commerce complaints, evidence of resolution statistics, and information on consumer rights and mediator responsibilities.

title: Policing Forum Registration
description: How do I register on a law‑enforcement message board and keep my identity private?
narrative: The user wants clear, step‑by‑step guidance on the registration workflow, including email verification, username guidelines, and privacy safeguards. They care about staying anonymous if desired and want to understand any potential monitoring or email targets. Relevant answers should explain the process from clicking "register" to following the confirmation email, and should mention any ways to maintain anonymity.

title: Digital‑Silver Format
description: I need guidance on how to map digital camera image aspect ratios and resolutions onto traditional silver photographic format sizes (e.g., 10x15, 15x21, 20x30) to avoid cropping or white borders when printing, and what practical steps or tools are recommended.
narrative: The user is a digital photographer who wishes to produce high‑quality prints on classic silver paper sizes. They require detailed information on the relationship between digital formats (notably the 4:3 sensor ratio and the 3:2 film ratio), conversion tables, and recommended cropping or interpolation practices to align with specific silver formats. Relevance is defined by documents that provide technical specifications of silver formats, explain digital camera sensor ratios and resolution requirements, outline conversion guidelines or recommended software, and include illustrative examples or case studies. Works covering the philosophy of unique photography and format choice such as *Making Photographs in the Age of Ubiquity* may also inform the user’s artistic decision‑making process. Documents about legal terms of sale, while useful for procurement, are outside the immediate technical focus and therefore less relevant.

title: Egg‑free Leek Pie
description: How can I prepare a leek pie without using any eggs?
narrative: The user is allergic to eggs and wishes to bake a traditional leek pie or quiche. Relevant results should describe concrete egg‑replacement methods or provide alternative recipes that omit eggs entirely while maintaining binding, texture, and flavor. The solution must be practical for an egg‑allergic cook and include ingredient substitutions (e.g., flaxseed, chia, applesauce, yogurt, or commercial egg replacers) or a fully self‑contained recipe that eliminates eggs without compromising the pastry or filling.

title: Baby Care Games
description: I'm looking for free online games where I can play as a caregiver to a baby or toddler, involving tasks such as feeding, bathing, dressing, and interactive play activities.
narrative: The user wants to find online free games that simulate child‑care responsibilities. Relevance is indicated by documents that describe games where the player helps Baby Hazel with routine care activities—brushing teeth, dressing, bathing, feeding, and playing. The search should highlight games offering interactive caregiving tasks in a child‑friendly environment, with free access and no download required.

title: Mobility Budget Transition
description: What are the steps, eligibility conditions, and calculation methods for an employee who had a company car to switch to a mobility budget, and how are the different pillars taxed?
narrative: The user is an employee or HR professional trying to determine whether a move from a traditional company car to the new mobility budget is feasible. They need to understand (1) the employer and worker pre‑conditions (36 months of car availability for the employer, 12 months of car usage or eligibility for a car for the worker, and the 3‑month continuous requirement), (2) how the budget amount is derived from the total cost of ownership of the deregistered car, (3) the three pillars of the budget – environmentally friendly car, sustainable transport options, and cash balance – and what each allows the employee to spend, (4) the tax and social security implications for each pillar, and (5) practical examples that illustrate the calculation and the benefit limits. The narrative also mentions the complementary sustainable mobility package that can be combined with the budget up to the €600 ceiling, and clarifies common pitfalls such as the impact of partial compliance or the treatment of unused balance.

title: SFR Nevers Outage
description: Where can I find up‑to‑date information about the SFR service outage affecting Nevers, France?
narrative: The user is a resident of Nevers experiencing internet, telephone, and TV service disruptions with SFR. They want real‑time status updates or official announcements that indicate whether the outage is ongoing, its cause, and a projected restoration time. Relevant documents are those that provide current outage reports, official SFR status pages, or credible user‑generated updates from that geographical area. Irrelevant items are general SFR marketing, unrelated service information, or reports from other regions.

title: Oil Lamp Safety
description: What safety precautions should I observe when using oil lamps?
narrative: The user seeks detailed, step‑by‑step guidance on safe operation of oil lamps, covering storage, wick handling, oil selection, ignition and extinguishing practices, and child and pet protection to prevent fires.

title: Porto Monthly Rental
description: I want to rent a car in Porto for one month, including cost, insurance, options, and monthly changes.
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on renting a vehicle for a month in Porto, wants to know cost, insurance coverage, vehicle options available, pickup/return locations, whether they can change car each month, and any restrictions or requirements. Relevant documents are those with Sixt monthly rentals and GUERIN car rental in Porto.

title: Moon Based Planting
description: How can I use the lunar calendar to determine the optimal potato planting and harvesting times for my garden in northern France?
narrative: The user is a home gardener in northern France seeking detailed guidance on incorporating the lunar cycle into potato planting decisions.  They want the specific dates and phases to plant seed potatoes, when to stop extra plantings, how to time the harvest, and how to align this with local climate, frost risks, and recommended spacing.  Relevance criteria include providing year‑specific lunar dates, regional climate adaptations, and practical planting tips that tie lunar phases to observable signs such as lilac flowering and soil moisture.

title: Hiring Senior Incentives
description: Which French state incentives help employers hire workers aged 50 and over, and what are the contract types, eligibility thresholds, and subsidy amounts?
narrative: The user is a small‑enterprise owner who wishes to hire a senior employee (age 50+).  They need to identify all applicable French state aid schemes that support such hires, including the form of employment contract (CDI, CDD, professionalisation, etc.), the maximum number of employees eligible in a firm, the monetary value of the aid per hire, and any specific conditions (e.g., contract duration, sector, and employee status).  Relevant documents are those that describe the "Help hire 50 and over" programs, the associated financial support (e.g., €2,000 per senior hire), and the process for applying for and claiming the aid.
